gates.name: Pedestrian/Drone Long-Horizon Gate
gates.next_fix: Provide local SDD/OpenTraj/full pedestrian data with verified t+50/t+100.

gates.name: Scene-Gold Gate
gates.next_fix: Manually confirm at least one pedestrian/drone scene or two usable scene packs.

gates.name: Multi-Agent Episode Gate
gates.next_fix: Build more multi-agent windows from real pedestrian/drone scenes.

gates.name: GoalBench-Gold Gate
gates.next_fix: Improve gold/silver goals; avoid majority top-k saturation.

gates.name: Failure Predictor Gate
gates.next_fix: Scene/goal/multi-agent features should improve failure prediction.

gates.name: Failure Correction Gate
gates.next_fix: Need >=10% over strongest baseline on BaselineFailureBench.

gates.name: HardBench Gate
gates.next_fix: Need >=10% over strongest baseline on HardBench.

gates.name: Interaction Gate
gates.evidence: full_hard={'tgsim': -0.299673, 'tgsim_i90': -0.003275}; no_interaction_hard={'tgsim': -0.298009, 'tgsim_i90': -0.003544}; aux={'graph_improves_over_scalar_auxiliary': False, 'improves_hard_failure_trajectory_performance': False, 'reason': 'Stage 8 interaction auxiliary is diagnostic unless benchmark metrics show trajectory lift.'}
gates.next_fix: Multi-agent interaction must improve hard/failure trajectory metrics.

gates.name: Stage 5C Readiness Gate
gates.evidence: Do not enter Stage 5C. Scene/goal-conditioned deterministic correction is not strong enough.
gates.next_fix: Pass Stage 8 deterministic scene/goal gates first.
